name: Meleager
description: Meleager was a hero in Greek mythology, son of King Oeneus and Queen Althaea of Calydon. His destiny was intertwined with a fateful prophecy: the Fates declared he would live only as long as a log burning in the hearth remained unconsumed. Althaea snatched the log and hid it, securing her son's life. Meleager grew into a renowned warrior, known for his courage and skill in battle. He famously led the Calydonian Boar Hunt, a perilous expedition to slay a monstrous boar sent by Artemis to ravage Calydon as punishment for Oeneus's neglect of her worship. Many of the most celebrated heroes of Greece joined him, including Atalanta, the skilled huntress with whom Meleager fell in love. After Atalanta drew first blood on the boar, Meleager finished the beast. However, a dispute arose over the spoils of the hunt, particularly the boar's hide. Meleager awarded it to Atalanta, sparking a conflict with his uncles, Althaea's brothers. In a fit of rage, Meleager slew them. When Althaea learned of her brothers' deaths at her son's hand, she was consumed by grief and vengeance. Recalling the prophecy, she retrieved the hidden log and threw it into the fire, fulfilling the Fates' decree. Meleager died instantly, a tragic end brought about by family strife and the fulfillment of a dark prophecy. He is remembered as a symbol of heroic prowess, the dangers of hubris, and the destructive power of fate and familial vengeance.
subtitle: Hero of the Calydonian Boar Hunt
achievements: Assembling a team of Greek heroes
Winning many battles in his youth

keyMyths.title: The Calydonian Boar Hunt
keyMyths.description: Artemis sends a monstrous boar to ravage Calydon. Meleager gathers a band of heroes, including Atalanta, to hunt it down, culminating in a fierce battle and the boar's demise.

keyMyths.title: Meleager's Death
keyMyths.description: After killing his uncles in a dispute over the boar's hide, Meleager's mother, Althaea, fulfills the prophecy by burning the log tied to his life, causing his instant death.

keyMyths.title: The Prophecy of the Fates
keyMyths.description: At Meleager's birth, the Fates decree his life is tied to a burning log. Althaea hides the log, but later uses it to avenge her brothers' deaths, resulting in Meleager's demise.

sources.author: Apollodorus
